form.formComment: Useful mare. Last start won by a neck this track on March 25 over 3200m slow track defeating The Cistercian with 64.5kg at $51 in a hurdle. Start before made some head-way from midfield; finished 11th of 14 runners at Carlisle on February 16 over 3400m, slow track; 36 len behind He's Bresilian with 69kg at $67. Racing well. Key contender.

form.formComment: Last run finished fifth of 15 starters at Kelso on March 21 over 3200m, 7 len behind Queenie St Clair with 66kg at $34. Run before finished ninth of 11 runners at Carlisle on February 3 over 3400m, 16 len behind Haarar carrying 71kg at $12. Right in the mix if anywhere near her best.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming ran last at Newcastle on January 27 over 4100m, on heavy track; 57 len behind Twistthenightaway carrying 72kg at $29. Last start won by 1.3 len Market Rasen on March 15 over 3700m defeating Natus Vincere with 76kg at $15 in a hurdle. Racing well. All set to continue the strong recent form.

form.formComment: Racing well. Freshened for 38 days. Last outing finished third of 7 runners at Ayr on March 6 over 3200m, on slow going 6 len behind Platin Moon with 73kg at $5. Before that won by 1.0 len Newcastle on February 21 over 3400m defeating Sattam with 71kg at $7.50 in a hurdle. Progressing well this campaign. Chance on her best form.

form.formComment: Racing second-up today. Fresh up after three months finished fourth of 8 starters at Kelso on April 2 over 4200m, 5.5 len behind Take A Hike carrying 74kg at $13. Previously second-up fell at Musselburgh on November 28 over 4000m. Has the ability to test the top fancies.

form.formComment: Last run finished ninth of 11 starters at Sedgefield on March 19 over 4000m, 36 len behind Cosmic Soul with 74.5kg at $19. The run before didn't finish the race at Newcastle on February 21 over 3400m. Confidence looks to be down.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming finished second of 9 runners at Carlisle on March 8 over 3400m, slow track; 3 len behind Queen Roslyn carrying 65.5kg at $21. Second-up finished second of 8 runners at Carlisle on April 4 over 3900m, 0.8 len behind Different Drum with 66.5kg at $3.30. Fitter now and making headway every start. Expected to take beating again.

form.formComment: Comes off a 41 day let-up. Last outing finished fifth of 12 runners at Newcastle on March 3 over 4100m, 19 len behind Big Storm Brewing with 66.5kg at $10. Race before finished eighth of 11 starters at Southwell on February 18 over 4100m, on slow going 19 len behind In The Purple with 68kg at $15. Further improvement needed to be winning this.
